title: Draper 1.0.0 released
summary: Today, I released Draper 1.0.0! Draper is a gem that gives you decorators/view models for Rails. Rubygems: https://rubygems.org/gems/draper GitHub: https://github.com/drapergem/draper README: https://github.com/drapergem/draper/blob/master/README.md You can get it with Rubygems:…
content:
Today, I released Draper 1.0.0! Draper is a gem that gives you decorators/view models for Rails.

  • Rubygems: https://rubygems.org/gems/draper
  • GitHub: https://github.com/drapergem/draper
  • README: https://github.com/drapergem/draper/blob/master/README.md

You can get it with Rubygems:

$ gem install draper

or by adding this to your Gemfile:

gem "draper", "~>1.0.0"

Draper supports all versions of Rails 3, and follows SemVer, so you can be confident that your application will work well with Draper in the future. Thank you to everyone who tried out our six (six!!!11) beta releases and gave us patches and feedback.
